messages.content: Grinder settings — I need to lock in the Breville Barista Express for the Purity Coffee Protect bag. Double shot.
What are you pulling now and what's the taste? I need to know where you're starting so we can dial to the right place.
I've been at grind size 3-4 with the amount knob around 12 o'clock for single, 2 o'clock for double. 18g in, aiming for 36g out in 25-30 seconds.

That's a reasonable starting point but the double shot is likely extracting slow or sour depending on the roast level of Purity Protect. That coffee is medium roast, which often needs a finer grind than you'd expect to pull cleanly in 22-30 seconds.

Pull a shot and tell me the time and taste — is it running long (bitter, dry), short (sour, thin), or landing in range?

For the WDT and puck screen: WDT with the 18-needle Normcore before tamping, puck screen seated after tamping. Those tools should be eliminating channeling as a variable.
I went to grind size 2, amount at about 3 o'clock, 18g in. Got 38g out in 22 seconds. Tastes good.

That's your dial. Lock it in.

Final settings: grind size 2, grind amount 3 o'clock, 18g dose, 38g yield, 22 seconds. Slightly above 1:2 ratio at 1:2.1 — works well for a medium roast where you want a bit more body and sweetness without thinning out.

To save the volume in the Breville: press PROGRAM, press the shot button, let it run to 38g, then stop it at that weight — the machine saves the new volume. Next time you press the double shot button it stops at 38g automatically.

Note the grind at 2 — that's finer than most guides suggest for the Barista Express on medium roast, but the result confirms it. Don't drift back toward 3-4 unless you change beans.

facts: The Breville Barista Express has a 54mm portafilter
Final dialed double shot settings: grind size 2, grind amount 3 o'clock, 18g dose, 38g yield, 22 seconds
The brew ratio is approximately 1:2.1 (18g in, 38g out)
Purity Coffee Protect is a medium roast requiring a finer grind than typical guides suggest
The PROGRAM button saves a new volume to the shot button on the Breville Barista Express
decisions: Lock in grind size 2 at 3 o'clock amount for double shots on Purity Coffee Protect

metadata.notes: Sourced from syl/memory/2026-01-30.md — espresso dialing session on Breville Barista Express
